name: Bean & Cheese Chimichangas W/Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cheddar or Monterey jack cheese, grated
2 teaspoons ground cumin OR 2 tbsp. taco seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F.
2. Combine beans, cheese, 2/3 cup salsa, and cumin or taco seasoning in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Spoon about 1/3 to 1/2 cup of the bean mixture into the center of each tortilla. Add about 1/4 cup of prepared Spanish rice, if using. Fold the tortillas envelope fashion.
4. If frying, place the folded tortillas seam side down in preheated oil and fry on each side until browned. If not frying, bake in oven for about 10 minutes (or 15 minutes if baking).
5. While baking, peel and cut avocado into a small bowl. Mash with a fork. Add lime juice, garlic, salt, and 3 tablespoons salsa. Mix well.
6. Serve chimichangas with guacamole, sour cream, and salsa.
